---
title: "Shohruh Miryusupov"
page-layout: full
---

<div class="home-intro">

Experiments, notes, and small studies.

</div>

<div class="home-posts">

<div class="post-row">
  <span class="post-title"><a href="/blog/posts/first-post.html">Why this site exists</a></span>
  <span class="post-date">Apr 2026</span>
</div>

</div>
